name: music-hub-iroh-bridge
description: React Native TurboModule bridge for minimal Iroh mobile sessions
author: Gordo Labs

scripts.ubrn:android: ubrn build android --release --config ubrn.config.yaml --and-generate && node scripts/patch-ubrn-cmake.mjs
scripts.ubrn:ios: IPHONEOS_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET=13.0 ubrn build ios --release --config ubrn.config.yaml --and-generate && node scripts/patch-ubrn-ios.mjs
scripts.ubrn:generate: ubrn generate jsi turbo-module --config ubrn.config.yaml && node scripts/patch-ubrn-cmake.mjs && node scripts/patch-ubrn-ios.mjs
